CREATE TABLE bitmaps_table (id UInt32, bitmap_data AggregateFunction(bitmap, UInt32));
INSERT INTO bitmaps_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5])), (3, bitmapBuild([6, 7, 8]));
SELECT id, bitmapOrCardinality(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([10, 20, 30])) AS res FROM bitmaps_table;
SELECT bitmapOrCardinality(bitmapBuild([1, 2]), (SELECT bitmapBuild([2, 3])) AS b) AS res;
SELECT bitmapOrCardinality(bitmapBuild([1]), bitmapOrCardinality(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]), bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]))) AS res;
CREATE TABLE new_bitmaps_table AS SELECT id, bitmap_data FROM bitmaps_table;
SELECT bitmapOrCardinality(b1.bitmap, b2.bitmap) AS res FROM (SELECT bitmap_data as bitmap FROM new_bitmaps_table) AS b1, (SELECT bitmap_data as bitmap FROM new_bitmaps_table) AS b2;
SELECT bitmapOrCardinality(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]), (SELECT bitmapBuild([4, 5, 6]) AS nested_bitmap)) AS res;
